statement: Synthetic services using acme-cache-client v4.3+ with verified TLS should add tls.ca_bundle before the upgrade is considered safe.
scope: Synthetic cache client upgrades in services that keep TLS verification enabled.

evidence_refs.summary: Synthetic upgrade note documents the tls.ca_bundle requirement for verified TLS.
The synthetic config became compatible only after tls.ca_bundle was added.
The synthetic compatibility test failed before the TLS config update and passed after the migration.
